title: escalation.md output schema (legal-contract-review)
description: Who-signs-what for each clause that needs escalation. Drives the human approval flow. High-risk items prepend the Escalation Override red banner.

override_triggered.description: true when any escalation row triggers the Escalation Override red banner

detail.description: concrete description filled into the Override block

placeholder_warnings.description: lines warning that escalate_to is still '[請編輯…]' for one or more findings — surfaces uncustomised bundled fallback

escalate_to.description: from frontmatter — NEVER rewritten by LLM

trigger_reason.description: what fired: walk_away matched / risk_default red / etc.

trigger_text.description: verbatim trigger from walk_away_triggers list, when applicable
